user_system_path: All user-facing frontend surfaces must feel like the same finished Foldera product system while preserving the shipped dashboard app-fit contract.
forbidden_files_raw: `app/api/**`, `app/dashboard/page.tsx`, dashboard app-fit components, `lib/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation routes, outbound email paths, schema migrations, destructive DB actions
required_local_proof: npm run build; npm run lint; npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list; npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts --reporter=list; npx playwright test tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list; npx playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-visual-qa.spec.ts --reporter=list; npm run health
required_product_proof: Landing, auth/onboarding, legacy app/settings/account surfaces, and mobile-critical routes share the Foldera visual/app contract; logged-out landing nav shows Sign in + Start free; logged-in landing nav shows Dashboard instead of Sign in; shipped dashboard app-fit remains green.
required_browser_proof: public-routes, dashboard-navigation, authenticated-routes, and mobile-visual-qa Playwright lanes plus proof-only screenshots outside the repo.
acceptance_condition: All main user-facing surfaces share one Foldera visual/app contract, public nav auth behavior is proven, dashboard app-fit remains intact, and build/lint/health are green.
stop_condition: Stop if build, lint, public-routes, dashboard-navigation, authenticated-routes, mobile-visual-qa, public production smoke, health, push, or GitHub CI fails; do not broaden into backend/API, source freshness, paid generation, outbound email, Stripe, schema, or destructive DB work.
source_truth_finding: Public-nav auth awareness was deferred after the dashboard app-fit seam and A-Z route-fit work was next.
required_closure_update: Update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and append SESSION_HISTORY.md with the frontend surface contract receipt and proof results.
browser_proof_command: npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/mobile-visual-qa.spec.ts --reporter=list
anti_regression_checks: Dashboard app-fit components and app/dashboard/page.tsx stay untouched
logged-out landing nav shows Sign in and Start free
logged-in landing nav shows Dashboard and hides Sign in
public landing does not add a client /api/auth/session poll
auth and onboarding routes remain OAuth-safe and mobile usable
legacy app/settings routes use the shared Foldera surface without fake phone or mock-card frames
mobile visual QA has no horizontal overflow on covered routes
next_command: Commit and push the verified frontend surface contract seam, then verify GitHub CI and deploy truth.
